name: ai-doc-generator-root
description: Root manager for AI Document Generator (FastAPI + React)

scripts.setup: npm run frontend:install && npm run backend:install
scripts.dev:
echo "
[32m>>> To start the project, open TWO terminals:[0m

[34mTerminal 1:[0m npm run static:dev
[34mTerminal 2:[0m npm run backend:dev
" && exit 1
